text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 169 

GAP_MOPP_COINS_OS 

LABEL: Gap Mail Order Preferred Pharmacy Coinsurance for other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a day’s supply of the drugs (other 
than 1 or 3 months) on this tier, using a mail order preferred pharmacy (MOPP) during the coverage 
gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
